title: Roasted Portuguese Chicken Wrap
description: A roasted and velvety Portuguese dish featuring orange juice, served in a pandan leaf wrap, perfect for a sick day, and low glycemic friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, orange juice, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 25 minutes or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the pandan leaves by washing and drying them.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
To assemble the wrap, place a few slices of the chicken onto a pandan leaf and serve immediately.
